top_signals.title: U.S. to continue 'technical talks' with Iran after Trump said ceasefire was 'over'
top_signals.summary: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed’s Williams Says AI Is Now His Main Inflation Concern - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Fed’s Williams Says AI Is Now His Main Inflation Concern  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: A huge trade just happened on the Nasdaq 100. Bulls are taking notice
top_signals.summary: Tech bulls may not have to wait much longer for fresh highs, if the single-biggest trade in the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF on Thursday is any indication.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Beijing and Tokyo can learn from China's 'Hong Kong of the north'
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Notice: Notices made under s32A of the Taxation (Cross-border Trade) Act 2018
top_signals.summary: Notices made which have the force of law under s32A of the Taxation (Cross-border Trade) Act 2018.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference Document for The Customs Tariff (Establishment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Find the UK’s most favoured nation tariff rates as referenced in The Customs Tariff (Establishment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020.

top_signals.title: NSA revives 'Tailored Access Operations' name for elite hacking unit
top_signals.summary: NSA last week changed the moniker of its Office of Computer Network Operations (CNO) back to Tailored Access Operations (TAO), a name that is sure to elicit nostalgia among the broader digital community for a group with roots in the early 1990s.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
